description_long: This object is a long, traditional-style shotgun with a wooden stock and a metal barrel. The stock features a smooth, slightly curved design with a reddish-brown finish and a white or light-colored inlay bordered by a thin red line. The barrel is long and slender, constructed from dark metal, and extends in a straight line from the receiver to the muzzle. The receiver area appears robust, with visible mechanical details and a trigger guard beneath. The shotgun's overall design is classic, with no visible modern attachments or tactical modifications. The finish is matte, with some subtle wear and patina, suggesting regular use or age.
description: A classic long-barreled shotgun with a wooden stock featuring a light inlay and a dark metal barrel. The design is traditional, with a matte finish and visible mechanical details.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock with light inlay and the long, dark metal barrel.
description_view_1: Front-on view down the barrel, emphasizing the circular muzzle and the narrow profile of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the full length, with the stock's inlay and the receiver's mechanical details visible.
description_view_3: Rear view from the buttstock, focusing on the width of the stock and the alignment of the barrel.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long and slender with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
